title: Lật Hình Tìm Cặp
instruction: Bé lật 2 lá bài để tìm hai hình giống hệt nhau. Mức Khó có 12 cặp nhé!

cards.name: Kỳ lân
cards.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M14 44c0-12 8-20 20-20 10 0 16 6 16 14 0 8-6 14-16 14H20a6 6 0 0 1-6-6z" fill="#FFF" stroke="#E9A9C6" stroke-width="3"/><path d="M40 26 l3-14 6 12z" fill="#C9B6F5" stroke="#9B85D6" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M44 14 l2-11 4 3z" fill="#FFE0A3" stroke="#EDC46F" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M20 30 q-8 4-6 16 q6-4 10-8z" fill="#FFB7C5"/><circle cx="43" cy="34" r="2.6" fill="#6B4E71"/><path d="M50 40 q4 2 4 5" stroke="#E9A9C6" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
